results.title: Kalshi referral code ALCOM15: Where does LeBron James go?
results.description: Use the Kalshi referral code ALCOM15 to claim a $15 bonus to trade on where LeBron James will end up before next season

results.title: Oil climbs as Middle East conflict escalates
results.description: Oil rises over Middle East conflict escalation; Brent crude up >2% as tensions intensify. Asian markets affected, with tech stocks under pressure and dollar strengthening against peers.
